channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 77/100 (critical)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 77/100 (critical). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 73.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): King Charles unveiling government’s agenda at the state opening of parliament – UK politics live
item.description: King Charles unveiling government’s agenda at the state opening of parliament – UK politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Roy Jenkins: “I vacillated about going against Harold Wilson as a cautionary tale.” Wes Streeting: “At last, we will recreate the legendary Roy Jenkins leadership tilt from the iconic book ‘For the love of god do not ...
item.description: Roy Jenkins: “I vacillated about going against Harold Wilson as a cautionary tale.” Wes Streeting: “At last, we will recreate the legendary Roy Jenkins leadership tilt from the iconic book ‘For the love of god do not ...
